prompt: Pass C TABLE_EXTRACTION_SYSTEM_PROMPT from invoice-table-extraction.ts (via deployed extract-invoice)
correct_runs_definition: A run is CORRECT only if Chocolate AND Nata AND Gema ALL match ground truth on quantity, unit, unit_price, and total. Per-item columns show how many of 3 runs each item matched individually.

methodology_caveats.direct_openai_on_exact_crops: NOT RUN — OPENAI_API_KEY unavailable locally. Would be required for pixel-exact A–E crops without re-crop.
methodology_caveats.extract_invoice_exact_crop: Sending exact crop PNGs triggers Pass C detectTableBounds AGAIN; effective OCR region ≠ intended y range. See effective_ocr_y below.
methodology_caveats.production_baseline: Full image → detectTableBounds top=218 bottom=448 (includes 218–235 strip)

results_table.notes: Re-crop drops top 17px (218–235). Mostly reliable; Chocolate failed 1/3 runs.
Heavy re-crop removes header+rows. Chocolate always wrong despite strip gone.
Same effective region as C but 3/3 correct — OCR variance, not strip geometry.
Strip fully excluded by design. 3/3 correct (via re-crop path).
Production path includes 218–235 strip. All three items failed all 3 runs.

strip_causes_failure.label: LIKELY
strip_causes_failure.evidence: Production detect top=218 (includes 218–235 strip) → 0/3 correct. Paths whose effective OCR starts ≥235 often succeed (A 2/3, D/E 3/3).

exact_threshold_y.label: HYPOTHESIS
exact_threshold_y.evidence: Cannot isolate exact y threshold because extract-invoice re-crops pre-cropped PNGs to unpredictable effective regions. C and D share effective y=273–448 but scored 0/3 vs 3/3.

strip_is_sole_cause.label: HYPOTHESIS — rejected
strip_is_sole_cause.evidence: C (strip excluded, effective 273–448) scored 0/3 while D/E (same effective region) scored 3/3. OCR non-determinism is a major confound.

reliable_threshold.label: LIKELY
reliable_threshold.value: Effective OCR region starting at y≥235 (17px strip excluded) is necessary but not sufficient for reliability; 2–3/3 on A, 3/3 on D/E vs 0/3 production.

PROVEN: Production path (218–448 with strip) → 0/3 all-three correct across 3 runs
extract-invoice re-crops exact crop PNGs; intended y ≠ effective OCR y
Nata per-item is stable (3/3) across most crops; Chocolate is the primary failure mode on production path
LIKELY: Including 218–235 header-margin strip correlates with table-only OCR failure on numeric columns
Excluding strip (effective y≥235) improves but does not guarantee correctness
HYPOTHESIS: Exact reliability threshold is y≥235 for table-only prompt
17px strip is the sole root cause (confounded by OCR variance)
